dc:title: Loaded touring bicycle beside a rural field
dc:description: A loaded touring bicycle is parked in the foreground beside a metal roadside guardrail. The bicycle carries rear panniers, a rolled sleeping mat or foam pad strapped to the front, water bottles mounted within the frame, and additional small bags attached to the handlebars and frame. Behind the guardrail is a dry, harvested agricultural field extending across gently rolling terrain. Low shrubs, eroded mounds, distant hills, and a broad sky with thin clouds occupy the background. No people are visible.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
